creator: bc979@lafn.org
text:
It has been almost 9 years since I submitted the patch.  I doubt any of the committers are going to be interested in it now.  Most likely it will get an OBE status to get rid of it.

I recommend you just go ahead and patch it yourself.  That is what I have been doing for years.  You do have to keep an eye out though for system updates as some of them will replace it with the "official" version.
